--- title: "ex06. Conditional DPM (SB Backend)" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Conditional DPmix: Stick-Breaking Backend **Purpose**: Replace the CRP backend with stick-breaking truncation while keeping the covariate-dependent bulk structure. This demonstrates how fixed `components` interplay with covariates. --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("nc_posX100_p3_k2", package = "CausalMixGPD") y <- nc_posX100_p3_k2$y X <- as.matrix(nc_posX100_p3_k2$X) if (is.null(colnames(X))) { colnames(X) <- paste0("x", seq_len(ncol(X))) } summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) ggplot(data.frame(y = y, x1 = X[, 1]), aes(x = x1, y = y)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "darkorange") + geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "navy", fill = NA) + labs(title = "y vs X1 (SB)", x = "X1", y = "y") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/data-setup-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Conditional Dataset Summary (SB)
statistic value
N 100.000
Mean 3.454
SD 2.406
Min 0.377
Max 10.870
````` ::: ::: --- ## Model Specification ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_sb_normal <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "normal", backend = "sb", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) bundle_sb_cauchy <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "cauchy", backend = "sb", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) ``` ::: --- ## Running MCMC ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_normal <- load_or_fit("ex06-conditional-dpm-sb-fit_sb_normal", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb_normal)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_mean, sd, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (20) - alpha - beta_mean[] (15 elements) - v[] (4 elements) conjugate sampler (5) - sd[] (5 elements) categorical sampler (100) - z[] (100 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_cauchy <- load_or_fit("ex06-conditional-dpm-sb-fit_sb_cauchy", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb_cauchy)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, scale, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (25) - alpha - scale[] (5 elements) - beta_location[] (15 elements) - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (100) - z[] (100 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_normal) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Normal Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 557.275 lppd: -243.03 | pWAIC: 38.443 beta_mean[2, 1] -0.29 1.523 -3.093 -0.433 3.243 8.076 beta_mean[3, 1] 0.119 1.685 -3.157 0.6 2.795 12.208 beta_mean[4, 1] -0.085 1.64 -2.479 -0.435 3.255 16.761 beta_mean[5, 1] -0.103 1.192 -1.878 -0.377 2.716 16.102 beta_mean[1, 2] 0.108 0.773 -1.064 0.032 1.788 39.354 beta_mean[2, 2] -0.286 1.977 -4.361 0.064 3.231 5.473 beta_mean[3, 2] 0.319 1.74 -2.77 0.482 3.901 8.968 beta_mean[4, 2] -0.756 1.74 -3.657 -0.838 2.397 29.061 beta_mean[5, 2] -0.983 1.884 -3.459 -1.439 2.772 8.028 beta_mean[1, 3] 0.328 0.633 -0.868 0.21 1.943 26.597 beta_mean[2, 3] -0.749 1.493 -3.73 -0.591 1.768 6.438 beta_mean[3, 3] -0.711 1.664 -3.429 -0.741 2.547 15.724 beta_mean[4, 3] 0.662 1.233 -2.649 0.957 2.519 32.085 beta_mean[5, 3] 1.415 1.454 -1.67 1.579 3.639 17.512 sd[1] 0.054 0.01 0.036 0.053 0.073 112.333 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_cauchy) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Cauchy Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 3 WAIC: 608.289 lppd: -250.281 | pWAIC: 53.864 Summary table parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess weights[1] 0.439 0.091 0.3 0.42 0.64 9.896 weights[2] 0.283 0.057 0.167 0.29 0.37 11.716 weights[3] 0.183 0.056 0.09 0.17 0.293 8.184 alpha 1.911 1.122 0.522 1.663 4.689 26.383 beta_location[1, 1] -0.046 0.971 -1.707 -0.049 1.814 8.544 beta_location[2, 1] 0.409 1.988 -3.49 0.464 3.522 21.689 beta_location[3, 1] 1.567 1.814 -1.4 1.827 4.686 6.793 beta_location[4, 1] 0.705 2.333 -4.09 0.795 4.337 10 beta_location[5, 1] -0.684 1.004 -2.437 -0.67 1.589 11.242 beta_location[1, 2] -0.785 1.853 -3.938 -1.114 3.103 14.58 beta_location[2, 2] 0.389 2.294 -3.943 0.597 3.849 16.46 beta_location[3, 2] 0.377 1.407 -2.735 0.642 2.855 19.471 beta_location[4, 2] -0.287 2.07 -4.024 -0.135 3.44 23.622 beta_location[5, 2] -0.861 1.905 -3.746 -1.155 4.068 10.795 beta_location[1, 3] -0.804 1.118 -2.986 -0.86 1.004 12.234 beta_location[2, 3] 0.274 1.967 -3.563 0.495 3.655 15.622 beta_location[3, 3] 1.959 0.785 0.314 2.053 3.303 29.8 beta_location[4, 3] 0.078 1.877 -3.056 0.066 3.709 21.214 beta_location[5, 3] -0.554 1.324 -2.745 -0.52 1.55 5.984 scale[1] 1.999 0.518 1.101 1.961 3.019 48.5 scale[2] 1.93 0.703 0.779 1.861 3.332 53.699 scale[3] 1.523 0.757 0.47 1.36 3.577 53.635 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} params_sb <- params(fit_sb_normal) params_sb ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "1.275" $w [1] "0.81" $beta_mean x1 x2 x3 comp1 "0.839" "0.108" "0.328" comp2 "-0.29" "-0.286" "-0.749" comp3 "0.119" "0.319" "-0.711" comp4 "-0.085" "-0.756" "0.662" comp5 "-0.103" "-0.983" "1.415" $sd [1] "0.054" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Conditional Predictive Density ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_new <- expand.grid(x1 = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 3), x2 = c(-1, 1), x3 = 0) colnames(X_new) <- colnames(X) y_min <- max(min(y), .Machine$double.eps) y_grid <- seq(y_min, max(y) * 1.1, length.out = 200) densities_normal <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_sb_normal, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste0("x1=", round(X_new[i, "x1"], 1), ", x2=", X_new[i, "x2"]), model = "Normal" ) }) densities_cauchy <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_sb_cauchy, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste0("x1=", round(X_new[i, "x1"], 1), ", x2=", X_new[i, "x2"]), model = "Cauchy" ) }) df_cond <- bind_rows(densities_normal, densities_cauchy) ggplot(df_cond, aes(x = y, y = density, color = label)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "SB Conditional Predictive Densities", x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/cond-predict-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Quantile Drift with Covariates ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_eval <- cbind(x1 = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 5), x2 = 0, x3 = 0) colnames(X_eval) <- colnames(X) quant_probs <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75) pred_q_normal <- predict(fit_sb_normal, x = as.matrix(X_eval), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) pred_q_cauchy <- predict(fit_sb_cauchy, x = as.matrix(X_eval), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) quant_df_normal <- pred_q_normal$fit quant_df_normal$x1 <- X_eval[quant_df_normal$id, "x1"] quant_df_normal$model <- "Normal" quant_df_cauchy <- pred_q_cauchy$fit quant_df_cauchy$x1 <- X_eval[quant_df_cauchy$id, "x1"] quant_df_cauchy$model <- "Cauchy" bind_rows(quant_df_normal, quant_df_cauchy) %>% ggplot(aes(x = x1, y = estimate, color = factor(index), group = index)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 2) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "SB Conditional Quantiles vs x1", x = "x1", y = "y", color = "Quantile") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/quantile-drift-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Residuals & Diagnostics ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fitted(fit_sb_cauchy)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/residuals-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/residuals-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_sb_normal, family = c("traceplot", "autocorrelation", "geweke")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/diagnostics-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/diagnostics-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/diagnostics-3.png){width=768} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_sb_cauchy, family = c("density", "running", "caterpillar")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/diagnostics-4.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/diagnostics-5.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb_files/figure-html/diagnostics-6.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Takeaways - Stick-breaking component count is fixed but still supports covariate-dependent mixtures. - `predict(..., type = "density")` returns group-specific densities for each `X`. - `predict(..., type = "quantile")` reports posterior-mean quantiles; the median is the 0.5 quantile and shifts with `x1`. - Diagnoses rely on the same S3 `plot()`/`fitted()` pipeline available in other vignettes. --- ## Workflow Navigation - Previous: [ex05-conditional-dpm-crp](ex05-conditional-dpm-crp.html) - Next: [ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp.html) - Workflow index: [Roadmap](../roadmap.html) - Practical entry: [Examples](../examples/index.html)
